description: A recent unauthorized access incident has corrupted the camera configurations in the Nx Witness VMS. Restore the system to its correct state using the trusted backup file at /home/ga/Documents/camera_backup.json. Update each camera's settings (Name, Logical ID, and Recording Schedule including FPS and Stream Quality) via the Nx Witness REST API (https://localhost:7001, credentials: admin / Admin1234!) to match the backup data indexed by physicalId. Create a summary log of the restoration at /home/ga/Documents/restore_log.txt.
